title: Be an admin account, but not Utilize a License
excerpt:
It would be great to have the ability to be an admin account but not utilize a paid license. 
I am an IT Admin, that is NOT currently using the functionality in the system, I am only added for billing and administrative …

posts.author: ChrisBen (Christopher B Bongard)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to have the ability to be an admin account but not utilize a paid license.

I am an IT Admin, that is NOT currently using the functionality in the system, I am only added for billing and administrative functions.

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: This will be really helpful. A lot of other companies do this like Figma and Lucidchart. It doesn’t make sense to pay a full member license for an IT admin.
